mechanic.summary: A mission is NOT active the moment you take it. It comes with a RANDOMIZED objective; completing that objective activates the mission's ongoing effect.
mechanic.keyQuote: Mission objectives are randomized, and may include gaining time, earning End Reward Pulls, opening chests, getting Boons or Curses, or being offered a certain number of Beacons.
mechanic.greyRule: Only one Mission can be taken on at a time, and you will not be offered any Grey Beacons as long as one is already active. (So grey stays blocked until the active mission's objective is completed.)
mechanic.consequence: The objective is NOT a fixed property of the mission — the same mission rolls a different objective each pickup. It therefore cannot be pre-listed per mission; the player must input which objective they were given, and the advisor biases beacons toward completing it.
mechanic.confirmedBy: user, 2026-07-23 ("you don't instantly get the effect... you need to do something to activate it, such as open chest, get boons or curse")

objectiveTypes.label: Gain time
objectiveTypes.note: Green Beacon is the direct source. Blocked while Chronotrigger (no time gain) is active.

objectiveTypes.label: Earn End Reward Pulls
objectiveTypes.note: Purple and darkGrey grant pulls directly; high_roller/knife_edge/many pull missions also count.

objectiveTypes.label: Open chests
objectiveTypes.note: Yellow spawns flying chests; Materialism adds 2/challenge. Environmental chests count too (see Chronokinesis chest rules).

objectiveTypes.label: Get Boons
objectiveTypes.note: Blue is the direct boon source; boon-generator missions also count once online.

objectiveTypes.label: Get Curses
objectiveTypes.note: Purple and darkGrey grant curses. Purple therefore advances BOTH earn_pulls AND get_curses — doubly good when either is the active objective.

objectiveTypes.label: Be offered N Beacons
objectiveTypes.note: Orange raises beacon choices (more beacons offered per challenge); rerolls (pink/Gourmand) also increase total beacons seen.

incomplete: The wiki says objectives 'may include' these six, so the list may not be exhaustive. Candidates to confirm in-game: complete challenges, kill mobs, use beacon rerolls. Also unconfirmed: the exact quantity per objective (does it scale with challenge number?), and whether completing the objective is what unblocks grey or whether that is a separate 'fulfilled' state.
openQuestions: Are there objective types beyond these six? (kill mobs, complete challenges?)
Does the required quantity scale (e.g. 'open 3 chests' early vs 'open 8' late)?
Is 'objective complete' the same event as 'mission fulfilled / grey unblocks', or two steps?
